title: stack-graph — business model
note: Sample seed. The strategy-curator skill is the eventual write path; this is the read surface.

key_partnerships.text: Anthropic — Claude models + Claude Code primitives

key_activities.text: Author + maintain the graph of .claude primitives

value_propositions.text: Model an agent operating environment as a reviewable graph, then improve it via a PR-gated loop
Instantiate a product harness in hours, not weeks

customer_segments.text: Product teams running on Claude Code

revenue_streams.text: Pre-revenue — viability deferred until a product proves demand

vpc.segment: Operators building an agent operating environment

customer_jobs.text: Stand up a reliable, reviewable agent environment
Know which primitives still earn their place

pains.text: Ad-hoc .claude setups drift and break silently
No way to see the whole system at once

gains.text: One comprehension surface over the whole environment

pain_relievers.text: The graph browser makes the whole system legible

gain_creators.text: The dev-sprint loop turns insight into PRs

fit: Problem-solution fit is claimed on the legibility + drift pains (tested). Product-market fit is unproven (no commercial product yet) — viability is the open risk.
